news.t: Defiance Launches AVGX and SMCX, the First Leveraged Single-Stock ETFs on Broadcom and Super Micro Computer in the US

holdings.infoBox: AVGX is an equity ETF with a total of 12 individual holdings. The top holdings are US DOLLARS stock at 61.99%, BROADCOM INC SWAP MS at 33.61%, BROADCOM INC COM SWAP CAN - L at 32.92%, BROADCOM INC COM SWAP CS - L at 30.91%, and BROADCOM INC COM - SWAP - NM - L at 30.25%.

overview.description: The Defiance Daily Target 2X Long AVGO ETF (AVGX) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund seeks to deliver 2x leveraged exposure to the daily share price movement of Broadcom Inc. (AVGO), less fees and expenses, through derivatives like swap agreements AVGX was launched on Aug 21, 2024 and is issued by Defiance.

data.title: Defiance Launches AVGX and SMCX, the First Leveraged Single-Stock ETFs on Broadcom and Super Micro Computer in the US
data.text: MIAMI, Aug. 22, 2024 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Defiance ETFs proudly announces the launch of AVGX and SMCX, the first single-stock long leveraged ETFs for Broadcom and Super Micro Computer, respectively. De...
